seo.title: Chat Simulator | Discord, WhatsApp & Telegram Chat Simulator
seo.description: Create realistic Discord, WhatsApp, and Telegram chat screenshots with editable names, avatars, timing, attachments, playback preview, and PNG export.

usage.title: How to Use Chat Simulator
usage.description: Build realistic Discord, WhatsApp, and Telegram conversations with editable identities, platform-specific layouts, playback preview, and polished PNG export.
usage.content:
### Quick Start

Build a realistic chat screenshot in minutes with the tools already available in Chat Simulator.

1. Choose your platform from the top selector.
2. Click **Show settings** to customize the chat title, description, group photo, wallpaper, export ratio, and export quality.
3. Set the active identity: speaker name, avatar, and **Message side**.
4. Type messages to build the conversation. On supported layouts, use the attachment controls to add images or files as temporary front-end-only assets.
5. Hover any message to edit the text, avatar, or message time, or remove it completely.
6. Use **Play chat** to preview message pacing before export.
7. Click **Export PNG** to generate the final screenshot.

> **Tip:** Settings stay outside the preview and are automatically kept out of the exported image so the final asset looks like a real chat capture.

### Supported Platforms

- **Discord**: dark server-style layout with channel header, intro block, identity labels, editable chat content, and PNG export.
- **WhatsApp**: mobile-style group or private chat layout with platform-specific header, date separators, read states, attachments, and export-ready chat previews.
- **Telegram**: Telegram-inspired header, wallpaper area, date rules, outgoing message states, and platform-specific input bar.

### Supported Features

- Switch between **Discord**, **WhatsApp**, and **Telegram** from the top toolbar.
- Create a new conversation instantly with **New chat**.
- Edit or delete any message directly from the chat preview.
- Upload temporary **speaker avatars**, **group photos**, and **background images** without sending files to a server.
- Set the active speaker name and choose **Message side** to place the next message on the left or right.
- Edit individual **message timestamps** so each platform shows the correct time style.
- Update group or channel name, subtitle or description, and avatar from the settings panel.
- Use temporary **attachments** for supported layouts, including images and files rendered in the conversation preview.
- Preview the conversation with **Play chat**, including human-like pacing between messages.
- Export a clean **PNG screenshot** with ratio and quality presets.
- On desktop, exports download as a file; on phones and tablets, exports are sent to the system share sheet when supported.
- Export logic is optimized for uploaded assets and theme-heavy sites, helping avoid broken colors or tainted-canvas issues.

platformRoadmap.title: Platform Feature Roadmap
platformRoadmap.description: These are the next chat styles planned for expansion inside Chat Simulator. They are roadmap items, not live platform skins yet.
platformRoadmap.content:
### Planned Platforms

- **iMessage**: Apple-style iPhone conversation layout with blue and gray bubbles, mobile framing, and screenshot-ready chat composition.
- **Instagram**: Instagram DM-style chat simulation with creator-friendly layouts, media-aware messaging, and modern social UI details.
- **Facebook**: Facebook chat and comment-style conversation layouts for social proof mockups, post replies, and classic Messenger-adjacent flows.
- **Twitter**: X/Twitter DM-style message simulation for private conversation screenshots and social content mockups.
- **TikTok**: TikTok direct message and creator chat-style layouts designed for social content concepts and creator-style messaging scenes.
